<!--
  Thanks for the contribution! Please fill in each section so reviewers can
  understand and validate the change quickly.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences describing the change and the motivation. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` and `black --check src tests` pass locally.
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (unit suite, no heavy ML deps required).
- [ ] I have updated documentation where appropriate.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests covering the change.

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

## Verification steps

<!--
  Reproducible commands or curl snippets reviewers can run to verify the
  change locally. Example:

  ```bash
  docker compose up -d --build
  curl -F file=@examples/image1.jpg http://127.0.0.1:8008/api/v1/analyze
  ```
-->
